e.p: Hi, what's your name?
e.h: S + be + N

e.p: Where do you live?
e.h: I live in + place

e.p: What is your job?
e.h: I am + job / I work as + job

e.p: Do you want more information?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' và một câu ngắn.
e.h: Yes/No + I + V

e.p: Can I call you later?
e.h: Yes, you can / No, you can't

d.t: Tin nhắn quan tâm trên mạng

e.p: I like your photo, what is your name?
e.h: S + be + N

e.p: Do you like our post?
e.h: Yes, I + V / No, I don't

e.p: Can we send you more info?
e.h: Yes, please / No, thank you

e.p: Where do you work?
e.m: Nói tên chỗ bạn làm hoặc 'I don't work'.
e.h: I work at / I don't work
e.s: I work at a small shop.

e.p: Do you want a quick meet?
e.m: Trả lời 'Yes' hoặc 'No' và nói khi nào.
e.h: Yes, I can + time / No, I can't

e.p: Hello, may I have your name?
e.h: S + be + N

e.p: Do you have time now?
e.h: Yes, I do / No, I don't

e.p: Do you need help at work?
e.h: Yes, I need / No, I don't

e.p: Can I come to your office?
e.h: Yes, you can / No, you can't

e.p: When is good for a short meet?
e.m: Nói thời gian (ví dụ: tomorrow, morning).
e.h: Use: tomorrow / morning / night

d.t: Hẹn gặp tại quán cà phê

e.p: Do you like to meet at a cafe?
e.h: Yes/No + I + V
e.s: Yes, I like to meet at a cafe.

e.p: Where is a good cafe?
e.m: Nói tên hoặc nơi ngắn gọn.
e.h: Place name or 'near my house'
e.s: There is a cafe near my house.

e.p: Are you free tomorrow morning?
e.h: Yes, I am / No, I am not
e.s: Yes, I am free tomorrow morning.

e.p: Can we meet at 9 am?
e.h: Yes, I can / No, I can't
e.s: Yes, I can meet at 9 am.

e.p: Do you want tea or coffee?
e.m: Nói chọn một loại đơn giản.
e.h: I want + tea/coffee

d.t: Hỏi về nhu cầu đơn giản

e.p: Do you need a new service?
e.h: Yes, I need / No, I don't

e.p: What problem do you have?
e.m: Nói một vấn đề ngắn gọn (1-3 từ).
e.h: Use simple noun (e.g., work, phone)

e.p: Do you want a short demo?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't

e.p: Can you show your office on a map?
e.h: Yes, I can / No, I can't

e.p: Do you use a computer at work?
e.h: Yes, I use / No, I don't

d.t: Nói về lợi ích đơn giản

e.p: Do you want a faster work way?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't

e.p: Is saving time good for you?
e.h: Yes, saving time is good / No, it is not
e.s: Yes, saving time is good for me.

e.p: Do you like a simple plan?
e.h: Yes, I like / No, I don't like
e.s: Yes, I like a simple plan.

e.p: Can this help your team?
e.h: Yes, it can / No, it can't
e.s: Yes, it can help my team.

e.p: Do you want to try one week?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: Yes, I want to try one week.

e.p: Do you know a friend who needs help?
e.h: Yes, I know / No, I don't

e.p: Can you give a friend's name?
e.m: Nói tên bạn hoặc nói 'I don't know'.
e.h: My friend is + name / I don't know

e.p: Can I call your friend?
e.h: Yes, you can / No, you can't
e.s: No, you can't call my friend.

e.p: Do you want to get a small gift?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: Yes, I want a small gift.

e.p: Where is your friend now?
e.h: Use place word: school / home / city

e.p: Do you want a free test?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: Yes, I want a free test.

e.p: How many people in your team?
e.h: Use a number

e.p: Do you need help every day?
e.h: Yes, I do / No, I don't
e.s: No, I do not need help every day.

e.p: Can you start now?
e.h: Yes, I can / No, I can't

e.p: Do you pay at once or later?
e.h: I pay + at once / later

e.p: Did you like our talk?
e.h: Yes, I did / No, I did not

e.p: Do you have one question?
e.m: Nói một câu hỏi ngắn hoặc 'No'.
e.h: Use a short question or 'No'

e.p: Can I send a short note to you?
e.h: Yes, you can / No, you can't
e.s: Yes, you can send me a note.

e.p: Are you happy with the plan?
e.h: Yes, I am / No, I am not
e.s: Yes, I am happy with the plan.

e.p: Do you want a next meet?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: Yes, I want a next meet.

d.t: Khảo sát nhanh của khách hàng

e.p: Do you use our product now?
e.h: Yes, I do / No, I don't
e.s: No, I don't use it now.

e.p: Is the price good for you?
e.h: Yes, it is / No, it is not
e.s: Yes, the price is good for me.

e.p: Do you like the color options?
e.h: Yes, I like / No, I don't
e.s: Yes, I like the color options.

e.p: Do you tell a friend about us?
e.h: Yes, I tell / No, I don't

e.p: Would you give a star score (1-5)?
e.h: Use number 1-5

e.p: Are you free on Monday?
e.h: Yes, I am / No, I am not
e.s: No, I am not free on Monday.

e.p: Do you work every day?
e.h: Yes, I do / No, I don't
e.s: No, I do not work every day.

e.p: What time is good for you?
e.m: Nói một thời gian ngắn (ví dụ: morning, night).
e.h: Use: morning / night / now

e.p: Can you meet now?
e.h: Yes, I can / No, I can't

e.p: Do you prefer morning or night?
e.h: I prefer + morning/night

d.t: Đàm phán mua hàng đơn giản

e.p: Do you want to buy this?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: Yes, I want to buy this.

e.p: Do you pay now?
e.h: Yes, I pay / No, I don't

e.p: Is the color red ok?
e.h: Yes, it is / No, it is not

e.p: Do you want a small gift with it?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: No, I don't want a gift.

e.p: Can I deliver to your house?
e.h: Yes, you can / No, you can't
e.s: Yes, you can deliver to my house.

d.t: Chào hỏi và thu thập liên hệ nhanh

e.p: Hi, may I know your name?
e.h: S + be + N

e.p: Can I meet you this week?
e.h: Yes, I can / No, I can't
e.s: Yes, I can meet this week.

e.p: Do you use email?
e.h: Yes, I do / No, I don't

e.p: Are you busy now?
e.h: Yes, I am / No, I am not
e.s: No, I am not busy now.

e.p: Do you want a short call later?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: Yes, I want a short call later.

d.t: Hỏi ý kiến đơn giản về sản phẩm

e.p: Do you like this idea?
e.h: Yes, I like / No, I don't

e.p: Is this easy to use?
e.h: Yes, it is / No, it is not
e.s: Yes, it is easy to use.

e.p: Do you want more color choices?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: No, I don't want more colors.

e.p: Can we help you now?
e.h: Yes, you can / No, you can't
e.s: Yes, you can help me now.

e.p: Do you tell friends about the idea?
e.h: Yes, I tell / No, I don't

d.t: Ôn tập: Gặp khách và thu thập thông tin

e.p: Hello, what is your name?
e.h: S + be + N

e.p: Where do you live now?
e.h: I live in + place

e.p: What is your job now?
e.h: I am + job

e.p: Can I call you later for info?
e.h: Yes, you can / No, you can't
e.s: Yes, you can call me later.

e.p: Do you want more information now?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: No, I don't want more now.

d.t: Ôn tập: Hẹn gặp và xác nhận

e.p: Are you free this week?
e.h: Yes, I am / No, I am not
e.s: Yes, I am free this week.

e.p: Can we meet on Friday morning?
e.h: Yes, I can / No, I can't
e.s: No, I can't meet on Friday morning.

e.p: Where is good to meet?
e.m: Nói một nơi ngắn (ví dụ: cafe).
e.h: There is / at + place
e.s: There is a cafe near my house.

e.p: Do you want a short meeting?
e.h: Yes, I want / No, I don't
e.s: Yes, I want a short meeting.

e.p: Can I bring a paper for you?
e.h: Yes, you can / No, you can't
e.s: Yes, you can bring a paper.

d.t: Ôn tập: Theo dõi và giới thiệu bạn bè

e.p: Did you like our product?
e.h: Yes, I did / No, I did not

e.p: Do you tell a friend about us?
e.h: Yes, I tell / No, I don't
e.s: No, I do not tell a friend.

e.p: Can we call you next week?
e.h: Yes, you can / No, you can't
e.s: Yes, you can call me next week.

e.p: Are you happy with our help?
e.h: Yes, I am / No, I am not
e.s: Yes, I am happy with your help.

e.p: Do you know a friend who needs this?
e.h: Yes, I know / No, I don't
e.s: Yes, I know a friend who needs this.
